title: Nexus WorldKbValidationError
description: Structured detail placed inside the canonical ErrorResponse.details field when a World KB patch is rejected for domain-rule violations (HTTP 422, V1.73). Distinct from 409 WorldKbConflictError which is concurrent-write version mismatch only.

errors.description: Fatal validation messages that prevented the patch. Always present; empty on success.

warnings.description: Non-fatal validation messages. Always present; empty when none.
